Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Sun May 3 03:16:49 2026 -0400

    feat(server): reportedWorkers GraphQL query exposes worker_ingest derived view
    
    Surfaces ADR-022 rev 5 §Worker-server interface registry via a new
    reportedWorkers query distinct from the in-process workers query. Each
    entry is classified connected/stale/disconnected by elapsed time since
    last_event_at against the rev-5 30s probe interval. Tracks current_bead
    and current_attempt from the most recent ingested event/backfill.
    
    [.execute-bead-wt-ddx-7b753655-20260503T064620-a387a207-28f710ee]

commit 83ec78530887aa81ae6eb5db5bcaa0718aff7c0b
Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Sun May 3 03:16:49 2026 -0400

    feat(server): reportedWorkers GraphQL query exposes worker_ingest derived view
    
    Surfaces ADR-022 rev 5 §Worker-server interface registry via a new
    reportedWorkers query distinct from the in-process workers query. Each
    entry is classified connected/stale/disconnected by elapsed time since
    last_event_at against the rev-5 30s probe interval. Tracks current_bead
    and current_attempt from the most recent ingested event/backfill.
    
    [.execute-bead-wt-ddx-7b753655-20260503T064620-a387a207-28f710ee]

diff --git a/cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql b/cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql
index 0d23dc17..b0a553ba 100644
--- a/cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql
+++ b/cli/internal/server/graphql/schema.graphql
@@ -510,6 +510,37 @@ type Worker implements Node {
   lifecycleEvents: [WorkerLifecycleEvent!]!
 }
 
+"""
+ReportedWorker is one entry in the worker_ingest derived view (ADR-022 rev 5
+§Worker-server interface). Workers POST register/event/backfill best-effort
+and the server keeps an in-memory record per worker_id. Freshness `state`
+classifies the worker by elapsed time since `lastEventAt`:
+
+  - connected:    age <= 2 * probe_interval
+  - stale:        age <= 10 * probe_interval
+  - disconnected: otherwise
+"""
+type ReportedWorker {
+  """Server-issued worker identifier (from POST /api/workers/register)"""
+  id: ID!
+  """Project root from the worker's identity envelope"""
+  project: String!
+  """Harness name from the worker's identity envelope"""
+  harness: String!
+  """Freshness state: "connected", "stale", or "disconnected"."""
+  state: String!
+  """Timestamp of the most recent register/event/backfill payload."""
+  lastEventAt: DateTime!
+  """Number of mirror failures observed for this worker."""
+  mirrorFailuresCount: Int!
+  """True if the worker reported a backfill with dropped overflow."""
+  hadDroppedBackfill: Boolean!
+  """Bead ID from the most recent event/backfill payload, if any."""
+  currentBead: String
+  """Attempt ID from the most recent event/backfill payload, if any."""
+  currentAttempt: String
+}
+
 """WorkerLifecycleEvent records an operator lifecycle action."""
 type WorkerLifecycleEvent {
   """Action name, such as start or stop"""
@@ -2450,6 +2481,14 @@ type Query {
     workerID: ID!
   ): String!
 
+  """
+  List workers reported via the worker_ingest derived view (ADR-022 §Worker-server interface).
+  Distinct from the `workers` query, which surfaces the in-process execute-loop registry.
+  Each entry is classified connected/stale/disconnected by elapsed time since last_event_at
+  per the rev-5 freshness state model.
+  """
+  reportedWorkers: [ReportedWorker!]!
+
   # ==========================================
   # Agent Session Queries
   # ==========================================

Author: Test User <test@example.com>
Date:   Sun May 3 03:16:49 2026 -0400

    feat(server): reportedWorkers GraphQL query exposes worker_ingest derived view
    
    Surfaces ADR-022 rev 5 §Worker-server interface registry via a new
    reportedWorkers query distinct from the in-process workers query. Each
    entry is classified connected/stale/disconnected by elapsed time since
    last_event_at against the rev-5 30s probe interval. Tracks current_bead
    and current_attempt from the most recent ingested event/backfill.
    
    [.execute-bead-wt-ddx-7b753655-20260503T064620-a387a207-28f710ee]

diff --git a/cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_reported_workers.go b/cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_reported_workers.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..5bdf42d6
--- /dev/null
+++ b/cli/internal/server/graphql/resolver_reported_workers.go
@@ -0,0 +1,18 @@
+package graphql
+
+import "context"
+
+// ReportedWorkers is the resolver for the reportedWorkers field. Returns an
+// empty list when no provider is wired (e.g. the perf or test harness builds a
+// resolver without the ingest registry).
+func (r *queryResolver) ReportedWorkers(ctx context.Context) ([]*ReportedWorker, error) {
+	provider := r.Resolver.ReportedWorkers
+	if provider == nil {
+		return []*ReportedWorker{}, nil
+	}
+	out := provider.GetReportedWorkers()
+	if out == nil {
+		return []*ReportedWorker{}, nil
+	}
+	return out, nil
+}
diff --git a/cli/internal/server/reported_workers_adapter.go b/cli/internal/server/reported_workers_adapter.go
new file mode 100644
index 00000000..0d7063f3
--- /dev/null
+++ b/cli/internal/server/reported_workers_adapter.go
@@ -0,0 +1,51 @@
+package server
+
+import (
+	"time"
+
+	ddxgraphql "github.com/DocumentDrivenDX/ddx/internal/server/graphql"
+)
+
+// reportedWorkersAdapter adapts the in-memory worker_ingest registry to the
+// ddxgraphql.ReportedWorkersProvider interface used by the reportedWorkers
+// query. now is overridable so tests can advance the freshness clock without
+// mutating registry timestamps.
+type reportedWorkersAdapter struct {
+	reg *workerIngestRegistry
+	now func() time.Time
+}
+
+func newReportedWorkersAdapter(reg *workerIngestRegistry) *reportedWorkersAdapter {
+	return &reportedWorkersAdapter{reg: reg, now: func() time.Time { return time.Now().UTC() }}
+}
+
+// GetReportedWorkers implements ddxgraphql.ReportedWorkersProvider.
+func (a *reportedWorkersAdapter) GetReportedWorkers() []*ddxgraphql.ReportedWorker {
+	if a.reg == nil {
+		return nil
+	}
+	now := a.now()
+	snap := a.reg.snapshot()
+	out := make([]*ddxgraphql.ReportedWorker, 0, len(snap))
+	for _, rec := range snap {
+		w := &ddxgraphql.ReportedWorker{
+			ID:                  rec.WorkerID,
+			Project:             rec.Identity.ProjectRoot,
+			Harness:             rec.Identity.Harness,
+			State:               freshnessState(rec, now),
+			LastEventAt:         rec.LastEventAt.UTC().Format(time.RFC3339Nano),
+			MirrorFailuresCount: rec.MirrorFailuresCount,
+			HadDroppedBackfill:  rec.HadDroppedBackfill,
+		}
+		if rec.CurrentBead != "" {
+			cb := rec.CurrentBead
+			w.CurrentBead = &cb
+		}
+		if rec.CurrentAttempt != "" {
+			ca := rec.CurrentAttempt
+			w.CurrentAttempt = &ca
+		}
+		out = append(out, w)
+	}
+	return out
+}

# ADR-022 step 5b: derived-view query. reportedWorkers exposes the
# worker_ingest in-memory view of trusted-peer-reported workers. Filtered
# client-side by the current project's root path (see +layout.ts).
query ReportedWorkersByProject {
	reportedWorkers {
		id
		project
		harness
		state
		lastEventAt
		mirrorFailuresCount
		hadDroppedBackfill
		currentBead
		currentAttempt
	}
}

query WorkersByProject($projectID: String!) {

data.text:
Committed. Summary:

- `+layout.ts`: Added `ReportedWorkersByProject` query plus `/api/projects` lookup to resolve the project root path; results filtered client-side by project path.
- `+layout.svelte`: New "Reported workers" section with freshness badges (connected/stale/disconnected), lastEventAt, mirrorFailuresCount, hadDroppedBackfill "dropped" badge, currentBead column, duplicate-worker grouping, and a "reported by worker (not authoritative)" label.
- `worker.gql`: Added documentary `ReportedWorkersByProject` query.
- `e2e/workers-panel-derived-view.spec.ts`: 5 Playwright tests covering field rendering, freshness states, duplicate workers under one project root, empty state, and project-scope filtering.

`bun run check` is clean (0 errors); `bun run build` succeeds.
